home.title: Snake & Ladder
home.subtitle: Snakes and ladders where every snake and ladder is rolled into being by a real quantum coin. Place your chance orbs and outsmart the computer.
home.feature.dice.title: Quantum Dice
home.feature.dice.body: Qubit collapse decides ladder vs snake when you land on a placed tile.
home.feature.entangle.title: Linked Twins
home.feature.entangle.body: Two orbs share one fate — measuring one decides both, or they cancel out.
home.feature.ladder.title: New Board Every Game
home.feature.ladder.body: Where each ladder climbs and each snake slides is rolled fresh every game.
home.feature.tunnel.title: Ghost Pass
home.feature.tunnel.body: Land on your rival and you might slip right through them.
game.title: Snake & Ladder
game.newGameMessage: Your current match progress will be lost.
setup.pickQubit: Pick a chance orb, then tap a cell (6–95)
setup.humanTurn: Place your chance orbs on the board
setup.interference: Interference! Your qubit cancelled the opponent's.
onboarding.title: How to Play
onboarding.subtitle: Quantum Snakes & Ladders vs the computer — all on device.
onboarding.step1.title: Place qubits
onboarding.step1.body: During setup, pick chance orbs and tap cells 6–95 on the board. Green ring = ladder odds, red = snake.
onboarding.step2.title: Entangle & interfere
onboarding.step2.body: Pair qubits so collapse outcomes can interfere or resolve together.
onboarding.step3.title: Roll & collapse
onboarding.step3.body: Land on an orb to measure it — ladder up, snake down, or tunnel through rivals. Every roll runs a real quantum circuit; open the Quantum log to verify it.
settings.title: Settings
settings.stats.title: Statistics
settings.resetStatsMessage: All win/loss records will be cleared.
settings.monetization.title: Shop & items
settings.monetization.adsEnabled: Interstitial ads may appear every 3 games
settings.legal.title: Legal
privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: Snake & Ladder runs quantum simulations on your device. We do not operate game servers or collect gameplay telemetry.
privacy.section.data.title: Data we store locally
privacy.section.data.body: Settings, win/loss statistics, gold dice balance, and ad-removal status are saved on your device with AsyncStorage. Quantum circuits are computed locally and are not uploaded.
privacy.section.ads.title: Advertising
privacy.section.ads.body: On iOS we may request App Tracking Transparency before showing AdMob interstitials. Ad partners may collect device identifiers per their policies. Purchase ad removal to disable interstitials.
privacy.section.iap.title: In-app purchases
privacy.section.iap.body: Gold dice and ad removal are processed by Apple App Store or Google Play. We verify iOS receipts on-device before granting items. Purchase history for restore is handled by the store.
privacy.section.contact.title: Contact
privacy.section.contact.body: Questions about this policy: open an issue at github.com/infinite-loop-factory/app-factory or contact the publisher listed on the store listing.
shop.unavailable: The store is not available in this build. Please update the app to the latest version.
shop.title: Shop
shop.goldDescription: Gold dice bias your roll — 50% chance for the face you pick, 10% for each other face. Consumed on use.
shop.storeUnavailable: Store is not available right now
shop.verificationFailed: Purchase could not be verified. No items were granted.
shop.webUnavailable: In-app purchases are available in the iOS and Android apps only.
game.shopCta: Get gold dice in the shop

inspect.collapsedSnake: Became a snake — slides to cell {cell}
